overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom showing the protagonist Link exploring a vibrant turquoise hot spring surrounded by rocky mountains and geothermal steam vents. The character transitions from rocky shores into shallow water, surveys the landscape with a device, and climbs to an elevated vantage point.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline of turquoise hot spring

events.description: character steps from dark rocks into shallow turquoise water

agents.ego_description: walking along dark rocky shore and stepping into the turquoise water

entered.detail: dark gray rock formations along the water's edge
vibrant cyan-colored hot spring water with steam rising
large reddish-brown mountain range in the background
white steam rising from the hot spring surface

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a dark rocky shoreline with the character walking toward a vibrant turquoise hot spring. Steam rises from the water as the character steps from the rocks into the shallow pool, with red mountains visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow turquoise hot spring with mountain backdrop

events.description: steam density increases as character moves deeper into the hot spring

agents.ego_description: wading steadily through the turquoise water toward the misty mountains ahead

segments.scene_description: The character wades through the shallow turquoise water, moving away from the shore toward the center of the hot spring. Steam becomes more prominent in the mid-ground as the character approaches the misty areas, with the red mountain range remaining visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: hot spring approaching misty rock cliff face

events.description: approaching large gray rock formation emitting thick steam

agents.ego_description: continuing through the water toward a large mist-covered cliff face

entered.detail: large steep gray rock face with steam vents at its base

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive gray rock cliff on the right side, with thick steam emanating from its base. The lighting becomes slightly diffused by the increasing mist density as the character moves closer to the rock formation.

scene_state.functional_zone: hot spring with panoramic mountain views

events.description: character raises hand to activate a device (Purah Pad) to survey the area
character rotates to pan camera and survey the surrounding landscape

agents.ego_description: stops walking, raises a handheld device, and pans the camera to survey the panoramic landscape

entered.detail: distinctive tall pointed mountain peak with a structure on top

segments.scene_description: The character stops in the water and raises a device to survey the surroundings. The camera pans to reveal a tall spire mountain in the distance while the gray rock cliff moves out of view. Steam continues to rise around the character as they observe the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: light-colored rocky path along hot spring shore

events.description: exits water onto light-colored rocky shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking along the light rocky shoreline with the tall spire mountain prominently in view

entered.detail: pale gray and white rock formations along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character exits the water onto a light-colored rocky shore. The tall spire mountain becomes more prominent in the center of the frame as the character walks along the shoreline, moving closer to the distinctive peak.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rock outcrop overlooking hot spring

events.description: begins climbing up rock formation to higher elevation
reaches high vantage point with overhead view of turquoise water

agents.ego_description: climbing up a rock outcrop to reach a high vantage point overlooking the water

entered.detail: pale white rock face visible on the right side from the elevated position

segments.scene_description: The character climbs up a rock outcrop, with the camera ascending to an overhead perspective. From the elevated vantage point, the turquoise water is visible far below, and a white rocky cliff face comes into view on the right. The character stands on the high rocks looking down at the hot spring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark rocky shoreline into a vibrant turquoise hot spring, eventually ascending to a high mountain vantage point. It begins with the character stepping from dark rocks into shallow, steaming water, wading toward the center of the pool while red mountains loom in the distance. As the character approaches a massive gray cliff, the lighting becomes diffused by thickening mist before the camera pans away from the rock to reveal a distant, tall spire mountain. The scene then shifts as the character exits the water onto a light-colored shore and walks toward the prominent peak. Finally, the camera ascends as the character climbs a rock outcrop, transitioning to an overhead perspective that looks down upon the turquoise waters and a white rocky cliff face.
